title: fagraea dolichopoda
intro: Fagraea dolichopoda is a flowering plant species native to Borneo, belonging to the family Gentianaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Fagraea dolichopoda include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Fagraea dolichopoda can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
